reasoning: BC Hydro officially excluded Tesla from its EV charger rebate program on March 12, 2025, in direct response to the ongoing US-Canada trade disputes and as part of a directive to preference Canadian goods. Given that the trade war escalated into April 2025 (with the US imposing auto tariffs on April 3 and Canada imposing retaliatory tariffs on April 9) and considering the typical bureaucratic inertia of government-run utility programs, it is highly unlikely that this policy will be reversed and the website updated by July 1, 2025. Even if a trade resolution is reached between May and July, immediate site updates and policy rollbacks are improbable in such a short timeframe. Therefore, the probability that the BC Hydro webpage will still state Tesla is ineligible as of July 1, 2025, is very high.
